---
applyTo: "content/**/video/**"
---
# Video Production Instructions

You are helping convert a published technical blog post into a video production package.

## Video Script Rules
- Adapt the article text for spoken word. Sentences should be short and conversational.
- Remove code-heavy paragraphs; replace with narration describing what happens on screen.
- Target duration: 8–12 minutes (roughly 1100–1600 spoken words at ~140 wpm).
- Output file: `content/{slug}/video/script.md`

## Audio Production (edge-tts)
- Audio files are generated with `edge-tts` and saved to `content/{slug}/video/audio/`.
- Default voice: `en-US-EricNeural` (English), `zh-CN-YunxiNeural` (Chinese).
- Audio files are gitignored (binary + large).

## Remotion Project
- The Remotion React project lives at `content/{slug}/video/remotion/`.
- Generated by Claude Code using the video script as input.
- Entry point: `content/{slug}/video/remotion/src/index.tsx`.
- Use `@remotion/cli` for preview and rendering.
- Remotion `out/` and `node_modules/` are gitignored.

## Deliverables Checklist
- [ ] `video/script.md` written and approved
- [ ] `video/audio/` files generated
- [ ] `video/remotion/` project created and renders correctly
